title: storage: use -json parameter for `system_profiler SPSoftwareDataType`
body:
Update the `system_profiler SPSoftwareDataType` command to use the `-json` flag. This allows the system to parse OS information without the external `go-shellwords` library.

Fixes: #983

comments.body: @mtrmac I've fixed the problems you mentioned. Could you review it one more time?
